steps.title: Eliminate x by scaling the second equation
steps.content:
Multiply the second equation by 3 to match the coefficient of $x$ in the first equation:
$$3(3x + 3y) = 3(18)$$
$$9x + 9y = 54$$

steps.title: Subtract to isolate y
steps.content:
Subtract the scaled equation from the first equation to eliminate $x$:
$$(9x + 10y) - (9x + 9y) = 50 - 54$$
$$y = -4$$
That matches Choice A — $-4$.
